title: Exclusive: Saraf & Partners loses two Banking & Finance Partners to CMS INDUSLAW
description: In a significant lateral move, Abir Lal Dey and Satyadarshi Kunal, both Partners in the Banking & Finance and Projects practice at Saraf & Partners, have resigned to join CMS INDUSLAW. Abir is joining as Equity Partner and Kunal as Partner to bolster the firm's Banking & Finance and Projects, Energy and Infrastructure Practices (including Project Finance).The duo is taking a team with them, including Senior Associate Arnav Sinha and couple of associates.Saraf & Partners' founder
